title: SNAKE_V.01
description: Classic survival. Navigate the grid, consume data, grow longer.

title: GTA_VICE_CITY
description: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City is an action-adventure game set in the vibrant, neon-drenched streets of 1980s Miami. Join Tommy Vercetti as he builds his criminal empire, orchestrates daring heists, and navigates a world of betrayal and excess.

title: ANGRY_BIRDS
description: Angry Birds is a puzzle video game franchise created by Rovio Entertainment. Players use a slingshot to launch birds at pigs positioned on a structure, aiming to destroy them. The game became a massive global hit, spawning numerous sequels, spin-offs, and media adaptations, and is celebrated for its simple yet addictive gameplay mechanics and charming characters.
